info.name: EV Charging Station Network API
info.description:
## Postman Collection — 15+ API Endpoints, Fully Tested

This collection provides **40+ requests** covering **20+ distinct API endpoints**, all with automated test scripts for status codes and response structure. Use for submission review and integration testing.

### Collection Variables
- `base_url`: http://localhost:8000/api
- `auth_token`: Set automatically by Login/Register; used by protected endpoints

### Folder Structure (Easy Review)
1. **Authentication** (6) — Register, Login, Profile, Logout
2. **Vehicles** (2) — Create, List
3. **Stations** (6) — List, Nearby/Geo search, Filter by city, Detail, Create
4. **Chargers** (3) — List, Create, Update status
5. **Bookings** (4) — Create, List, Detail, Cancel
6. **Charging Sessions** (7) — Start (booking/walk-in), Cost preview, End, List, Detail, Filter by date
7. **Pricing** (3) — Estimate (normal, peak, off-peak)
8. **Error Handling Tests** (3) — 401, 404, 422
9. **Edge Case Tests** (10) — Concurrency, pricing multipliers, validation, overstay invoice

**Run order:** Use Collection Runner or run **2. Login** first to set `auth_token`, then run any folder. Seed data: `python manage.py seed_data`.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: User registration, login (token), profile, logout. Tests: status codes, token in response.

item.name: Vehicles
item.description: CRUD for user vehicles (make, model, connector type). Auth required.

item.name: Stations
item.description: List, geo search (Haversine), nearby endpoint, filter by city, detail, create. Includes distance_km in geo responses.

item.name: Chargers
item.description: List/create chargers per station; PATCH status (available|busy|maintenance|offline). Owner auth for create/status.

item.name: Bookings
item.description: Create booking (with pricing estimate), list, detail, cancel. Tests: confirmed status, pagination.

item.name: Charging Sessions
item.description: Start (from booking or walk-in), cost preview, end session (invoice), list, detail, filter by date. Tests: invoice with overstay.

item.name: Pricing
item.description: Price estimate by charger_id, duration_hours, start_hour. Tests: normal/peak/off-peak tiers and multipliers.

item.name: Error Handling Tests
item.description: Expected error responses: 401 Unauthorized, 404 Not Found, 422 Validation.

item.name: Edge Case Tests
item.description: Business rules: double booking rejected, peak/off-peak/DC-Fast pricing, past booking, maintenance charger, max duration, overstay invoice.
